transcript.text:
I don't eat that much because it's still morning
It's very simple, right?
[Around 32km (1 hour)] [Pier Samduk to Yokji Island]
[Tong Young Yokji Island Episode 2]
It's the one and only Chinese noodle restaurant here
It's seriously the best
[Tzuyang is here to take over]
I usually eat 2 times more than this
I was told that there's a really delicious Spicy Seafood Noodle place in Yokji Island
They are only open for 5 hours total (9:30 AM~2:30 PM)
I would have to wait in line if I don't get there first thing in the morning
So I'm here early!
[Noodle place in Yokji Island with around 40 years of tradition]
It's 9:43 AM
They should be open
[On her way to destroy the food]

You can't eat here if you're too late
[They only do lunch]
I came here 25 years ago
It was like this back then too
This place was very popular
It's different The broth is thick
It's delicious in general
They give you a lot of shrimp
[Crowded as soon as they open]
[Menu]
Excuse me,
Can I order 1 Jjajangmyun (Black Bean Noodles), 1 Udon,
1 Spicy Seafood Noodles, and 1 Medium-size Fried Pork, please
[Really shocked]
[No]
[Refusal of service] No?

Are you eating all of that by yourself?
[Why are they surprised?]
It's breakfast for me I don't eat that much for breakfast
So I only ordered 4 dishes
It's our first time showing our kitchen
Other TV programs came to film only the outside
[First time ever showing their kitchen through Tzuyang's channel!]
[40 years of tradition with all theses dishes]
[A flavorful broth of Spicy Seafood Noodles]
[Savory and refreshing broth of Udon]
[Glassy visuals of traditional black bean noodles]
Wow, that's a lot of fried pork
This is a medium?
Thank you
[This looks like a Large]
[Medium Fried Pork 20,000 Won (~$18.07 USD)]

Do they not come with the sweet & sour sauce?
Is this the Spicy Seafood Noodles?
Wait, this is the sweet & sour sauce Wow, that's a lot
A lot of sauce
I'm not sure if I can eat everything because it's breakfast
Delicious
It tastes even better because we're at a special place
[Spicy Seafood Noodles 7,000 Won (~$6.32 USD)] What is that? Spicy Seafood Noodles?
Thank you
This is the Spicy Seafood Noodles It has a lot of seafood inside
Shrimp,
Webfoot octopus,
A lot of them
Oysters too
Let's try the soup first
The flavor..

It's tasty even without the artificial flavoring powder
A very smoky seafood flavor
[Udon 7,000 Won (~$6.32 USD)]
Thank you
[Black Bean Noodles 5,000 Won (~$4.52 USD)] Lastly, Black Bean Noodles
The sauce looks delicious
[Mix it up really well]
[Dipping her sleeve in the soup]
This place is known for their Spicy Seafood Noodles
[Tzuyang's elbow mukbang]
[Tzuyang did what Tzuyang does]
It's still morning and I ruined my outfit already
Let's try the black bean noodles first There's meat here
The sauce is tasty
Old traditional black bean noodles flavor
1 bite of the fried pork It's good when it's fresh

Shrimp
A bite of the webfoot octopus
Spicy Seafood Noodles
It's best when eaten before the noodles get bloated Need to eat this one first
Such a nice breakfast
I love it
I'm eating a little bit because it's breakfast I don't eat a lot for breakfast
It's very refreshing
The black bean noodles look good?
But this place is known for the spicy seafood noodles
I'll put the udon in the middle That looks scrumptious
I can taste the sesame oil in this one
Sesame oil and egg soup
It's very nutty
Let's eat some udon now
It looks like they use the same types of noodles

It's pretty much the same thing, except this one is not spiced
They don't use the "udon noodles"
It's nutty
This one isn't spicy
But if you can't handle spicy food,
This will be your go-to
Tasty
I think the location is very important
The black bean noodles is very average
The udon is the end-game of nuttiness
The spicy seafood noodles is very refreshing and hits the spot
Full of seafood flavors
Does fried pork go well with soy sauce?
Only 1 way to find out
I like the sweet & sour sauce
[She knows what she likes]

I'm going to finish the rest of the black bean noodles
[Sauce mole and Sauce birthmark]
[No, it's not a watermelon seed]
[It's a black bean sauce mole]
[Why is she wiping my chin?]
Thank you
I'm worried Same
I'm worried
That lady is amazing
What in the world..
I didn't want to make her feel uncomfortable, so I was watching her with my peripheral vision
She's incredible
Yummy
[Her skills to filter out the veggies]
People want me to dip vs pour the sauce on the fried pork
So I'll just dump some in there

[Doesn't matter how it's done. She just likes to eat it]
This bowl of noodles So delicious
The oysters..
It's really big
So good
[Soup drinking show]
Udon is very savory
This is just what I like
That's a lot of food for a table of 4 They would maybe order that without the pork
Or share with 3 bowls of noodles
[Talking about Tzuyang]
[Watching Tzuyang TV in person]
I've never seen anyone do that
Never seen anyone eat that much food in my whole entire life
I usually eat 2 times more than this
[Nani!?]

[They don't believe her]
[A special lady from Seoul is here]
I was gonna give her only a little bit
But she asked me to give the proper portions, so I did
I told her to take the leftovers home for her mother
[Vacuum mode ON]
The reason why I only ordered a little bit is because
not only is it breakfast, but I'm also not good at eating Chinese noodles
I'm not good with these and rice
[She's not on a diet]
[Putting the rest of the pork inside the sauce]
Oyster!
[Now for the fried pork]
[Every little drop]
[Bottoms up]
[Brilliant vegetable filtering skills]

Sorry about the vegetables
Veggies, I'm always sorry
[Checking her belly] It's out
That's not even a big belly
That's amazing
Oh my..
Our fried rice is good too, you want some?
I want to, but it's still breakfast
She ate everything What is the world..
[Tong Young Yokji Island Episode 3]
[Order alcohol and they keep bringing you out seafood?]
I've never seen any of these
[Natural ink lip tint from Tong Young]
